title: CSU – Office Assistant, Project Fellow and More – 15 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CSU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Office Assistant, Project Fellow and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Sanskrit University (CSU) Recruitment 2026 for 15 posts of Various Contractual Positions. Candidates Can Apply Online.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., Masters/Integrated Masters Degree, Bachelor’s degree, BAMS, MCA/BE/B.Tech, Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounting, Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Mass Communication/Media/Film/Video Editing

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: Central Sanskrit University Post Doctoral Fellow
